# Pommy Burger and Pizza

Official website for Pommy Burger and Pizza in Addis Ababa, Ethiopia.

## Important pages

- [Home](https://pommydemo.netlify.app/)
- [Menu](https://pommydemo.netlify.app/menu/)
- [About](https://pommydemo.netlify.app/about/)
- [Contact](https://pommydemo.netlify.app/contact/)
- [Blog](https://pommydemo.netlify.app/blog/)

## Business information

- Addis Ababa, Ethiopia
- Plus code: XRRH+5Q Addis Ababa
- Phone: +251 95 690 5484
- Services: Dine-in and takeaway
